problem id: 663fd5e9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01110100 -> 10100011
  00010101 -> 00101000
  01001001 -> 01001010
  00101001 -> 01001001
  10111100 -> 11100101
  11111100 -> 11100111
  11110100 -> 10100111
  01010101 -> 00101010

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 00001100
